thought: Blend the scraped battle motion into the locked promotional poster by treating the first frame as a hard composition anchor, not as a full gameplay reset. I keep all characters, logos, title placement, vertical layout, and center-focused arrangement from @759557383bf7e6138d7e9ab5e0f08023.png, then borrow only the motion rhythm from @trimmed_best_ref_1774792159.mp4: a short 0.5-1s activation beat, followed by a compact 1-3s burst of slash contact, impact flash, and readable VFX. Because the scene is promotional_art and currently idle, I avoid turning it into a chaotic battle field; instead I animate subtle parallax first, then localized weapon glow, outline sweeps, and a controlled crossover battle reveal that preserves each character's poster pose and relative anchor. I selected only essential assets under the 9-asset limit: one first frame, one motion video, one hero action sheet, one enemy hit sheet, one slash VFX sheet, one impact VFX sheet, one battlefield background helper for depth treatment, one damage/UI pack, and one logo/title glow pack. The action is slow-to-stable in pose transitions, with brief burst accents for impact, plus clear physics feedback through recoil flashes, knockback illusion, floating damage numbers, and title/logo light sweeps. This keeps face stability, anatomy consistency, and the original crossover promo logic while still delivering a high-magic chibi battle energy suitable for Sword Legend.
prompt_en: First Frame: @759557383bf7e6138d7e9ab5e0f08023.png. Reference Video: @trimmed_best_ref_1774792159.mp4. Motion Style Reference: adopt the first 3-5 seconds combat rhythm from the reference video, with a short activation beat, compact chibi attack timing, limited camera movement, clear contact frames, readable area VFX, and concise impact feedback while preserving the original promotional poster composition and vertical layout. Start with @759557383bf7e6138d7e9ab5e0f08023.png as the first frame to lock character consistency, costume consistency, title placement, and logo arrangement. Preserve the exact promotional_art composition, center foreground duo, top logos, bottom title lockup, city-street backdrop, and outward-downward visual flow from upper center into the foreground with diagonal slash energy crossing left-to-right. [00s-01s] (Background Layer) hold the original crossover poster almost still, add very subtle parallax depth to the street and storefront perspective using @fantasy_battlefield_bg_215317.png only as a depth-treatment reference, with gentle breeze, tiny drifting leaves, and soft light shimmer; keep the background bright, clean, saturated, fantasy gacha game look. (Character/Action Layer) all characters remain in their original poster poses, with micro idle motion only: cloak edge flutter, hair tip sway, floating bob for the pink-haired girl, slight chest rise, and tiny weapon tilt accents inspired by @hero_chibi_battle_sheet_215009.png; movement must be slow, stable, and non-stiff. (VFX Layer) faint outline glow appears around the blue-haired fighter slash path and the white-haired swordsman blade using @slash_magic_vfx_sheet_215144.png, but without changing their positions. (UI Layer) a soft light sweep glides over the collaboration logos and lower title using @logo_title_ui_pack_213452.png, no heavy gameplay HUD yet. [01s-03s] (Background Layer) maintain the same poster framing with only a very slow push-in toward the central foreground duo, matching the restrained camera logic from @trimmed_best_ref_1774792159.mp4; no dramatic shake, just a tiny impact-ready settle. (Character/Action Layer) animate a brief crossover combat reveal while preserving all anchor positions: the hoodie-wearing martial-arts boy in the center subtly shifts weight forward and raises his leading arm in a compact strike-ready motion, the blue-haired fighter on the left completes a short diagonal slash continuation, and the white-haired swordsman on the right gives a restrained blade flare accent; motions are concise and chibi-scaled, not full relocation, using @hero_chibi_battle_sheet_215009.png. (VFX Layer) trigger a clean left-to-right diagonal slash trail from upper-center toward foreground with radiant blue-white energy from @slash_magic_vfx_sheet_215144.png, followed by a compact impact spark and shock ring from @impact_explosion_hitfx_sheet_215229.png; the effect should feel like a promotional battle accent rather than a full scene change. (UI Layer) add a few floating damage numbers and tiny critical flashes near the slash intersection using @battle_ui_damage_pack_215358.png, drifting upward and fading quickly, readable but secondary to the poster art. [03s-05s] (Background Layer) continue the slow push-in and add a mild luminous bloom behind the central duo while keeping storefronts and sky visible; no scene cut. (Character/Action Layer) resolve the attack rhythm from the reference video with a short hit confirmation beat: the central boy settles after the strike, the left fighter's slash completes, the right swordsman emits a final glint, the top-right pink-haired girl bounces lightly with cheerful energy, and the elevated muscular character keeps his heroic lifted pose; all faces remain stable without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural chibi proportions. (VFX Layer) a second brief impact pulse blooms at the slash endpoint with particles dissipating outward and downward, then fades into outline glow around the ensemble; use @abyss_enemy_hit_sheet_215055.png only as hit-reaction timing reference for recoil illusion, without adding new enemy bodies into the composition. (UI Layer) logo and title receive one final premium light sweep from @logo_title_ui_pack_213452.png, damage numbers finish floating upward and disappearing, leaving the poster in a polished crossover reveal state. Overall style: stylized 3D rendering, high-quality chibi character design, fantasy gacha game look, bright anime crossover key art, soft cel-shading, radiant gold, azure blue, crimson accents, polished material highlights, slightly low-angle frontal poster view, cinematic promo reveal, 4K ultra HD, cinematic texture, rich details, no jitter, stable face without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural proportions, non-stiff movement.
prompt_zh: > 首帧锁定: @759557383bf7e6138d7e9ab5e0f08023.png。参考视频: @trimmed_best_ref_1774792159.mp4。动作风格参考: 采用参考视频前3-5秒的战斗节奏，用短暂起手、紧凑Q版攻击时序、克制镜头运动、清晰接触帧、可读范围特效与简洁受击反馈，但必须保持原始联动宣传海报的构图、竖版布局与角色站位不变。以 @759557383bf7e6138d7e9ab5e0f08023.png 作为首帧锁定人物样貌、服装一致性、标题位置与顶部联动标识排布。严格保留 promotional_art 的原始构图：前景中心双主角、顶部联动logo、底部大标题、街道透视背景，以及从上中部向外向下延展、并带有左到右斜斩能量流向的视觉轴线。[00s-01s]（Background Layer）先稳住原始联动海报画面，整体几乎不动，只给街道和店铺透视加入极轻微视差层次，@fantasy_battlefield_bg_215317.png 仅作为景深处理参考，加入轻风、少量飘叶、柔和高光扫过，背景保持明亮、干净、高饱和、高魔手游宣传质感。（Character/Action Layer）所有角色保持原海报姿势不变，只做极轻的待机细动：披风边缘轻摆、发梢轻晃、粉发少女轻微漂浮起伏、胸腔呼吸、武器角度细小点动，参考 @hero_chibi_battle_sheet_215009.png，动作要慢、稳、不断裂、不过度。（VFX Layer）在蓝发角色的斩击方向与右侧白发剑士的刀刃边缘，叠加一层非常轻的轮廓发光与能量预热，使用 @slash_magic_vfx_sheet_215144.png，但不能改变角色位置。（UI Layer）用 @logo_title_ui_pack_213452.png 给顶部联动logo和底部标题做一次柔和流光掠过，不上重战斗HUD。[01s-03s]（Background Layer）保持同一张海报式取景，只做极慢的向中心前景双人推进，匹配 @trimmed_best_ref_1774792159.mp4 中克制的战斗镜头逻辑；不做剧烈震屏，只在爆点前有轻微蓄势感。（Character/Action Layer）在不破坏站位锚点的前提下做一次短促联动战斗揭示：中间穿连帽衣的武斗少年重心微微前送，前手抬起做紧凑出击准备；左侧蓝发角色完成一个短距离对角斩击延续；右侧白发剑士补一个克制的刀锋亮刃强调；所有动作都维持Q版短位移、短时长，不进行大范围换位，参考 @hero_chibi_battle_sheet_215009.png。（VFX Layer）使用 @slash_magic_vfx_sheet_215144.png 在上中部向前景生成一道蓝白色、左到右的斜向能量斩痕，再接 @impact_explosion_hitfx_sheet_215229.png 的紧凑爆点火花与小型冲击环；整体感觉应是宣传KV上的战斗强化，而不是强行切成真正实机战场。（UI Layer）用 @battle_ui_damage_pack_215358.png 在斩击交汇处附近加入少量飘字伤害与小型暴击闪字，数字向上漂浮后快速淡出，保证可读但不压过海报主体。[03s-05s]（Background Layer）继续缓慢推进，并在前景中心双人后方增加一层柔亮光晕，店铺街景与上方天空仍需清晰可见，不切场景。（Character/Action Layer）按参考视频节奏完成一次命中确认：中心少年出击后收势稳定，左侧蓝发角色斩击完成，右侧白发剑士给出最后一次刀锋闪光，右上粉发少女轻快弹跳一下增强联动活力，上方举起的壮硕角色维持英雄式高举姿态；所有面部稳定不变形，五官清晰，解剖结构正常，Q版比例自然。（VFX Layer）在斩击终点再补一次短促命中脉冲，粒子向外、向下扩散后快速消散，并让整组角色轮廓留下淡淡辉光；@abyss_enemy_hit_sheet_215055.png 仅作为受击节奏参考，用来制造“命中反馈错觉”，不要新增破坏原构图的敌人实体。（UI Layer）顶部logo与底部标题再做一次高级感流光扫过，伤害数字继续上浮并消失，最终停留在精修完成的联动宣传揭示状态。整体风格：stylized 3D rendering、high-quality chibi character design、fantasy gacha game look、bright anime crossover key art、soft cel-shading、radiant gold、azure blue、crimson accents、精致材质高光、轻微低机位正面海报视角、电影级宣传揭示感，4K ultra HD，cinematic texture，rich details，no jitter，stable face without deformation，clear facial features，normal anatomical structure，natural proportions，non-stiff movement。
